stage_payload.scope_summary: Two related gaps in the Brikette AI email-reply pipeline remain partially unaddressed after recent confidence-floor and booking-trigger fixes (commit 5eae09457f). This fact-find maps what is already fixed, what is not, and what needs to be built. **Gap 1 (Dispatch 0002):** The composite-path template selector (`selectQuestionTemplateCandidate`) applies a flat 70% confidence floor but lacks the hinted/unhinted category distinction that the single-question path (`selectSingleQuestionTemplate`) already has. A generic "faq" template (e.g., "Hostel Facilities and Services") can score ≥70% for an un
goals: Apply hinted/unhinted category distinction to `selectQuestionTemplateCandidate` (composite path),
Enforce `delivery_status: "blocked"` at the `gmail_create_draft` tool boundary (reject the call,
Tighten `TOPIC_SYNONYMS` in `coverage.ts` to prevent generic facility terms ("amenity", "facility")
non_goals: Rewriting the BM25 index or `rankTemplates` / `rankTemplatesPerQuestion` (working correctly for
Changing the `PER_QUESTION_FLOOR = 25` constant (already appropriate for candidate pre-filtering).
Fixing the separate `booking_context` broadness beyond what commit 5eae09457f already did.
constraints: All changes must stay within `packages/mcp-server`; no app-layer changes required.
`gmail_create_draft` schema change must be backward-compatible (new field optional with safe default).
Tests run in CI only (no local jest).
assumptions: The `UNHINTED_TEMPLATE_CONFIDENCE_FLOOR = 70` constant is the correct shared threshold; no new
`deliveryStatus` passed into `gmail_create_draft` is self-reported by the caller (not looked up);
key_entry_points: `packages/mcp-server/src/tools/draft-generate.ts` — orchestrates full draft pipeline; calls template

analysis_readiness.Blocking items: none (open question on error-handling style is advisory; default stated)

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: Missing hinted/unhinted distinction vs single-question path
"pool" → "amenity"/"facility" causes false covered for unknown topics
"Hostel Facilities and Services" confirmed as false-match candidate
3 gaps identified (composite gate, gmail reject, synonyms regression)

process_topology.trigger: Incoming guest email picked up by ops-inbox skill (`gmail_list_pending`).
process_topology.end_condition: Gmail draft created (`gmail_create_draft`) and presented to staff for review/send.
